evals.prompt: Generate the debian packaging for pamsignal
evals.expected_output: Complete debian/ directory with control, rules, changelog, copyright, postinst, prerm, postrm, source/format

evals.prompt: Create an RPM spec file for pamsignal targeting Rocky Linux 9
evals.expected_output: A pamsignal.spec file with EL9-appropriate settings, %meson macros, system user creation, config(noreplace)

evals.prompt: I need to package pamsignal for both Ubuntu 24.04 and Fedora 40
evals.expected_output: Both debian/ directory and .spec file, with distro-specific notes and meson.build fix suggestions
